name: Invoice Parser MCP
description: Parse invoices, receipts, and financial documents into structured JSON from your AI agent. Powered by Claude Vision. No templates, no OCR configuration needed.

tools.name: parse_invoice
tools.description: Full invoice parsing — vendor, line items, totals, due date.

tools.name: parse_receipt
tools.description: Retail receipt parsing — merchant, items, tax, payment method.

tools.name: extract_line_items
tools.description: Extract just the itemized list from an invoice or receipt.

tools.name: extract_totals
tools.description: Extract just subtotal, tax, total, and due date.

tools.name: validate_invoice
tools.description: Math validation — checks that line items add up to the stated total.

tools.name: export_to_csv
tools.description: Batch parse multiple files and export a summary CSV (max 20 files).

env.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
env.description: Your Anthropic API key for Claude Vision. Required to run the server.

env.name: INVOICE_PARSER_API_KEY
env.description: Your Invoice Parser API key for managed access. Get one at the service endpoint.
